title: Autodesk Construction Cloud (Public Beta)
description:
### Autodesk Construction Cloud (Public Beta)

This connector is intended for use with the Autodesk Construction Cloud products (Autodesk Docs, Autodesk Build, Autodesk Takeoff). To use the connector, you must create and provide your own Autodesk Platform Services application client ID and secret. Refer to the following documentation to generate an APS application: [https://tutorials.autodesk.io](https://tutorials.autodesk.io). Once you have provisioned your APS application, ensure it is added as a custom action within **ACC Account Admin > Custom Integrations**.

Most of the actions and triggers for this connector requires that the authenticated user at least has Docs permissions to projects within their respective ACC hub/account, otherwise the hub/account and/or project may not correctly display in the dropdowns for the actions and triggers.

To report issues with the connector, please reach out to acc-connect@autodesk.com.
